name: Tiramisu
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir the espresso, sugar, and brandy together until the sugar dissolves.
2. Remove 1/3 cup of the mixture and set aside. Whisk the egg yolks into the remaining coffee mixture. Add the mascarpone and whisk together until smooth; do not overmix or it may separate.
3. Line a 9 1/2 x 5 1/2-inch loaf pan with a large sheet of wax paper.
4. Dip the ladyfingers into the reserved coffee mixture, one at a time, briefly. Place them crosswise in the prepared pan, continuing until the bottom of the pan is lined.
5. Spread half of the mascarpone mixture over the ladyfingers. Sprinkle with 2 ounces of chocolate. Repeat for the next layer.
6. Top off with a final layer of ladyfingers. Fold the wax paper over the top and cover tightly with plastic wrap.
7. Refrigerate at least 6 hours.
8. Invert the chilled loaf onto a serving platter. Remove the wax paper.
9. Place the whipping cream, vanilla, and confectioner's sugar in a bowl and whip until stiff. Spread whipped cream all over the loaf and decoratively with a pastry bag.
10. Dust the top with cocoa powder using a fine strainer. Slice and serve.
